_comment: CICADA — Takehara Falls (gym 1, Bug) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), keeping the SAME relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 chaining so gym/engage/engage_takehara_leader still opens the battle from the endBack stage. Structure mirrors leader_intro: pull up over the challenger's shoulder framing Cicada, then a TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to her face (the two z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close holds mirror starter_reveal's push-in), cross high for a side profile, then drop home. startTitle names her; a bug-type effect cue (happy_villager + sculk_soul particles) is ANCHORED ON CICADA'S uuid body (execute at c577141c-…) so the burst lands ON her wherever cicada_float has left her, plus insect/beacon sounds sell the Broodmother reveal. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly. The camera path is the shared leader_intro geometry (verified via facingFrame); only the zoom-keyframe framing might want an in-world nudge at the real Takehara arena (float leader over the open-top floor-1 arena, floor 2055.5/138/2460.5).
_retune_2026_07_21: Opening keyframes 1-5 dropped 3.0 blocks (y 2.5/2.2/2.6 -> -0.5/-0.8/-0.4) and their down-pitch eased (12/6/8 -> 5/3/4): the scene opened ~3 blocks over Cicada's head. She hovers at conversation height y139 (cicada_float: arena floor y138, one block up) and hangs inverted; the +1.7775 rig offset put the old y=2.5 keyframe's eye at ~y142.3, ~3 above her. New y=-0.5 lands the eye at ~y139.3 (rig-corrected), level with her, so the near-level pitch centers her hanging body. kf6 (high side cross) and kf7 (drop-home into endBack battle) intentionally left high.

cues.command: execute at c577141c-305f-4c20-a6bb-444d3b4d5ae0 run particle minecraft:happy_villager ~ ~1 ~ 0.7 0.9 0.7 0.02 40 force
execute at c577141c-305f-4c20-a6bb-444d3b4d5ae0 run particle minecraft:sculk_soul ~ ~1 ~ 0.5 0.8 0.5 0.01 24 force
